title: I Said Goodnight Already
lyrics:
[verse]
I said goodnight, I meant it too
I hugged you and I walked away
But then I thought of something small
So now I'm back, what can I say

[chorus]
I said goodnight already
I said it six times now
I said goodnight already
But I keep coming back somehow

[verse]
I need a glass of water please
And also one more tiny thing
Did you remember to lock the door
And why do birds have wings

[chorus]
I said goodnight already
I said it six times now
I said goodnight already
But I keep coming back somehow

[verse]
Okay this is the last time
I promise on my life
But what's for breakfast in the morning
And can I have a night light

[chorus]
I said goodnight already
I said it six times now
I said goodnight already
Goodnight for real this time
I mean it
...goodnight
style_prompt: Fun catchy children's song, acoustic guitar and soft beat, slightly cool slightly funny, 100 BPM, the kind of song a kid would put on a playlist, not babyish, not trying too hard, genuine and a little self-aware, easy singable melody
cover_description: A child in pajamas peeking around a bedroom door for the sixth time, a parent sitting on a couch with hands on their face, a hallway with warm lighting, the child looking sheepish but clearly about to say something else
